title: Nifty Posts Worst FY26 Close as West Asia War Enters Week Five
title_cn: 西亚战争进入第五周，印度Nifty指数创FY26最差收盘

content.original_text: Markets ended the final session of FY2026 sharply lower on Monday, with the Nifty 50 falling 488 points or 2.14 per cent, marking a loss of 5.05 per cent for the full financial year. The decline came as the US-Iran conflict entered its fifth week without any credible pathway to resolution, and crude oil held above $100 a barrel. It was the worst monthly decline for equities in six years. The Nifty50 ended nearly at a one-year low and the Sensex at a 2-year low. The Sensex fell 1,636 points. India VIX, a measure of market volatility, surged to an intraday high of 28.79 before settling near 30. The Indian rupee plunged to a low of 95.21 against the dollar. Meanwhile, Indian government bonds slumped, with the 10-year benchmark bond yield posting its biggest monthly spike in nine years, breaching the 7% level for the first time since July 2024.

sentences.text: Markets ended the final session of FY2026 sharply lower on Monday, with the Nifty 50 falling 488 points or 2.14 per cent.
sentences.translation: 周一，市场以FY2026最后一个交易日大幅下跌收场，Nifty 50指数下跌488点，跌幅2.14%。

sentences.text: This marked a loss of 5.05 per cent for the full financial year.
sentences.translation: 这标志着整个财年损失了5.05%。

sentences.text: The decline came as the US-Iran conflict entered its fifth week without any credible pathway to resolution.
sentences.translation: 下跌发生之际，美伊冲突已进入第五周，且没有任何可信的解决途径。

sentences.text: Crude oil held above $100 a barrel, adding pressure to the markets.
sentences.translation: 原油价格维持在每桶100美元以上，给市场增加了压力。

sentences.text: It was the worst monthly decline for equities in six years.
sentences.translation: 这是六年来股票市场最严重的月度跌幅。

sentences.text: The Nifty50 ended nearly at a one-year low and the Sensex at a 2-year low.
sentences.translation: Nifty50指数收于近一年低点，Sensex指数收于两年低点。

sentences.text: India VIX, a measure of market volatility, surged to an intraday high of 28.79 before settling near 30.
sentences.translation: 印度VIX指数（衡量市场波动性的指标）飙升至日内高点28.79，随后收于30附近。

sentences.text: The Indian rupee plunged to a low of 95.21 against the dollar.
sentences.translation: 印度卢比兑美元跌至95.21的低点。

sentences.text: Meanwhile, Indian government bonds slumped, with the 10-year benchmark bond yield posting its biggest monthly spike in nine years.
sentences.translation: 与此同时，印度政府债券下跌，10年期基准债券收益率创下九年来最大的月度涨幅。

vocabulary.example: Prices rose sharply after the supply shortage.
The UN called for a peaceful resolution to the conflict.
Crude oil prices affect the global economy.
Investors are moving money from bonds into equities.
The stock market plunged after the bad economic news.
This fund is measured against the S&P 500 benchmark.
The bond yield reached 7% for the first time in years.
